prompt:
Remediate the supply-chain advisories in manifest fixtures/tripwire/web-dashboard/package.json on the cdugo/superset repository, branch tripwire/demo.

FINDINGS (remediate all of them in one PR)
  - marked (npm) installed version 4.0.0
      vulnerable: < 4.0.10
      advisories: GHSA-5v2h-r2cx-5xgj, GHSA-rrrm-qjm4-v8hf

TASK
  Open one PR against tripwire/demo on branch remediate/web-dashboard
  that removes every resolved version inside a vulnerable range. The
  repository is the cdugo/superset fork (https://github.com/cdugo/superset).
  This is a confirmation session for the Tripwire pipeline; on completion,
  report your terminal status so the orchestrator can record timing.

Follow the org Playbook 'tripwire-remediate-manifest' for the preference order
and acceptance criteria. Follow the Knowledge note 'tripwire-fixtures-conventions'
for install/build commands and base-branch conventions.
